item.title: Safe to Tow, Ready to Go
item.description: A vehicle is secured and ready for towing. What makes this process safe and efficient?

media:content.media:title: Safe to Tow, Ready to Go
media:content.media:description: A vehicle is secured and ready for towing. What makes this process safe and efficient?

item.title: School Bus Lifted High
item.description: See the dramatic sight of a school bus in the air during recovery. How was this heavy lift accomplished?

media:content.media:title: School Bus Lifted High
media:content.media:description: See the dramatic sight of a school bus in the air during recovery. How was this heavy lift accomplished?

item.title: Semi and SUV Collision!
item.description: A semi collides with an SUV, creating chaos on the road. What steps are taken to clear the scene safely?

media:content.media:title: Semi and SUV Collision!
media:content.media:description: A semi collides with an SUV, creating chaos on the road. What steps are taken to clear the scene safely?

item.title: Roadside Disaster Unfolds
item.description: Watch as a situation spirals into disaster, testing patience and skill. How will it be brought under control?

media:content.media:title: Roadside Disaster Unfolds
media:content.media:description: Watch as a situation spirals into disaster, testing patience and skill. How will it be brought under control?

item.title: Struggles on the Road
item.description: See the tough moments when the team faces challenges on the road. How do they push through the hard times?

media:content.media:title: Struggles on the Road
media:content.media:description: See the tough moments when the team faces challenges on the road. How do they push through the hard times?

item.title: Going Under to Get the Job Done
item.description: Watch as the team goes underneath to tackle a tough challenge, showing determination and problem‑solving in action. What will they find beneath?

media:content.media:title: Going Under to Get the Job Done
media:content.media:description: Watch as the team goes underneath to tackle a tough challenge, showing determination and problem‑solving in action. What will they find beneath?

item.title: Mobile Parking Lot High Centered
item.description: See what happens when a mobile parking lot gets stuck high centered, creating a tricky recovery situation. How will it be moved safely?

media:content.media:title: Mobile Parking Lot High Centered
media:content.media:description: See what happens when a mobile parking lot gets stuck high centered, creating a tricky recovery situation. How will it be moved safely?

item.title: Car Wreck on a Remote Road
item.description: See what happens when a vehicle is damaged far from help, highlighting the challenges of recovery in a remote location. How will the situation be resolved?

media:content.media:title: Car Wreck on a Remote Road
media:content.media:description: See what happens when a vehicle is damaged far from help, highlighting the challenges of recovery in a remote location. How will the situation be resolved?

item.title: Handling a Heavy School Bus
item.description: Take a closer look at the size and weight of a school bus in action. What makes this vehicle such a challenge to manage?

media:content.media:title: Handling a Heavy School Bus
media:content.media:description: Take a closer look at the size and weight of a school bus in action. What makes this vehicle such a challenge to manage?
